name: linkedin-chrome-copilot
description: LinkedIn / job-search copilot for Claude Code. Persistent save-state, pipeline CRM, channel-aware drafts, Calendly booking, CV tailoring, profile sync. macOS Chrome automation delegated to claude-mac-chrome sibling plugin. No PII in committed artifacts — enforced by pii-scan CI gate.
requires_notes: Requires claude-mac-chrome >= 1.1.1 installed as a sibling plugin. macOS 13+ only. See README Platform Support section.
